description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in New Orleans, Louisiana, with a history dating back to the late 19th century. Engaged in racketeering, extortion, gambling, narcotics, and murder. Reached its height under Silvestro Carollo and Carlos Marcello. Declined after Marcello's imprisonment in the 1980s and death in 1993, though some elements may remain active.

country_links.evidence_quote: He was involved in a 1968 corruption scandal and assasinaton plot along with Elliot Roosevelt in the Bahamas.
country_links.context: An associate was involved in a corruption scandal and assassination plot in the Bahamas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Primarily the New Orleans metropolitan area, with additional territory throughout Louisiana, Mississippi and Texas, as well as Las Vegas and Havana
country_links.context: The New Orleans crime family has territory in Havana, indicating it operates there.

country_links.evidence_quote: He later resided in Haiti and operated casinos under the Duvalier family.
country_links.context: An associate resided in Haiti and operated casinos under the Duvalier family.

country_links.evidence_quote: The New Orleans crime family, also known as the Marcello crime family or the New Orleans Mafia, is an Italian American Mafia crime family based in New Orleans, Louisiana.
country_links.context: The New Orleans crime family operates in the United States, with its base in New Orleans, Louisiana, and conducts criminal activities such as racketeering, gambling, and drug trafficking across multiple states.
